query:
SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  atoll,
  overview,
  heroImage,
  quickFacts,
  topThingsToDo,
  faq
FROM island_guides
WHERE atoll = 'Alif Alif Atoll'
LIMIT 1
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  atoll,
  overview,
  heroImage,
  quickFacts,
  topThingsToDo,
  faq
FROM island_guides
WHERE atoll = 'Alif Alif Atoll'
LIMIT 1

rows.name: Bodufolhudhoo
rows.overview: Bodufolhudhoo is a charming local island nestled in the Alif Alif Atoll of the Maldives, offering an authentic Maldivian experience away from the bustling resort islands. Known for its pristine white sandy beaches, crystal-clear turquoise waters, and vibrant house reef, it's a paradise for snorkelers and divers. The island maintains a peaceful, laid-back atmosphere, allowing visitors to immerse themselves in local culture and witness daily island life. With a focus on sustainable tourism, Bodufolhudhoo provides an idyllic escape for those seeking natural beauty, marine adventures, and genuine Maldivian hospitality.
rows.quickFacts: ["Located in Alif Alif Atoll (North Ari Atoll), Maldives.","A local inhabited island, offering an authentic Maldivian experience.","Known for its pristine bikini beach and vibrant house reef.","Accessible by public ferry, speedboat, or seaplane from Malé.","Population is relatively small, fostering a peaceful atmosphere.","Alcohol is not permitted on local islands due to Maldivian law.","Dress modestly when outside the bikini beach area.","Excellent destination for snorkeling, diving, and marine excursions."]
rows.topThingsToDo: [{"emoji":"🤿","title":"Snorkeling on the House Reef","description":"Explore the vibrant house reef surrounding Bodufolhudhoo, teeming with colorful coral formations and diverse marine life, including reef sharks, turtles, and countless fish species."},{"emoji":"🐬","title":"Dolphin Watching Trip","description":"Embark on a boat trip at sunset to witness pods of playful dolphins leaping and swimming in their natural habitat, a truly magical experience."},{"emoji":"🏖️","title":"Relax on the Bikini Beach","description":"Spend your days unwinding on the island's designated bikini beach, soaking up the sun, swimming in the calm lagoon, and enjoying the serene ocean views."},{"emoji":"🐢","title":"Turtle Snorkeling Excursion","description":"Join a guided excursion to nearby reefs known for their sea turtle populations, offering an incredible opportunity to swim alongside these majestic creatures."},{"emoji":"🎣","title":"Sunset Fishing","description":"Experience traditional Maldivian handline fishing as the sun sets, and perhaps catch your own dinner under the guidance of local fishermen."},{"emoji":"🚶","title":"Explore the Local Village","description":"Wander through the quiet streets of Bodufolhudhoo, interact with friendly locals, observe daily life, and discover small shops and cafes."}]
